description_long: This is a classic wooden baseball bat with a natural brown finish along the barrel and a distinct red handle section. The bat tapers smoothly from the thick, rounded barrel to a narrower handle, which is capped with a black end. The handle appears to be wrapped or painted in a solid red color, providing a visual and tactile contrast to the rest of the bat. The surface of the bat is smooth and hard, typical of polished wood, with no visible logos, text, or decorative markings on the barrel or handle. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use in parks, playgrounds, or urban recreational areas.
description: A wooden baseball bat with a brown barrel and a red handle, featuring a smooth, polished finish and a black end cap. The design is simple and unmarked, emphasizing functionality.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the brown barrel and red handle.
description_view_1: Angled view from the handle end, emphasizing the black end cap and the red handle section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the full length and the color transition from red handle to brown barrel.
description_view_3: Angled view from the barrel end, focusing on the rounded, solid wood tip and the tapering shape.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is a simple, flat, black-colored section at the end of the handle, with no visible markings or logos.
